top_signals.title: Oil prices ease after spiking following fresh U.S. strikes against Iran
top_signals.summary: Oil prices turned lower on Thursday after the U.S. carried out fresh strikes on Iran, renewing concerns about supply disruptions in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Taiwan’s Yang Cautions Against Borrowing to Buy Red-Hot Stocks
top_signals.summary: Taiwan’s central bank chief has warned investors of the risk of borrowing to invest in the island’s red-hot stocks, which have been surging on global demand for tech products at the heart of the AI boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump tells CNBC 'I've been right about everything'
top_signals.summary: A NATO Summit for the history books concludes, with the collapse of the ceasefire with Iran stealing headlines and surprising markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK Grid Issues Another Supply Warning as Heat Tests Network
top_signals.summary: The UK grid operator issued another warning over tight electricity supplies for Thursday evening as a heat wave stretching across Europe strains power systems, marking the third such alert this summer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump turns on Spain and demands Greenland as NATO summit exposes cracks
top_signals.summary: The office of Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said it was treating Trump’s statements as business as usual, adding bilateral relations benefited both nations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Live markets: Bitcoin ETFs slip back to outflows while ether funds extend their streak
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Felons, Fraudsters Flog Offensive Cybersecurity Startup
top_signals.summary: A cybersecurity startup dangling millions of dollars to acquire zero-day security vulnerabilities in popular software is run by a pair of far-right conspiracy theorists and convicted felons whose most recent ventures included fake intelligence companies and a now-defunct AI-based lobbying platform they operated under assumed names.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasury Yields Little Changed as Markets Wait for Fed Minutes - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Treasury Yields Little Changed as Markets Wait for Fed Minutes  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Inside India newsletter: India's $50 billion worth of IPOs at risk as Trump ends Iran ceasefire
top_signals.summary: After a slow start this year, IPOs worth $50 billion were ready to hit Indian markets. These plans are at risk after the U.S. ended the ceasefire with Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Seven & i Raises Profit Outlook, Bolstering Turnaround Hopes
top_signals.summary: Seven & i Holdings Co. lifted its profit and sales outlook for the current fiscal year, raising hopes that the convenience-store operator’s turnaround efforts are taking hold.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hyundai Card completes its first real-world stablecoin pilot with Avalanche, Tether
top_signals.summary: Visa and Circle will participate in Hyundai Card's second stablecoin PoC, which is set to begin later this month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

alerts.title: Lenders Seek $700 Million After Japan Payments Firm’s Collapse
alerts.summary: Creditors across Japan are trying to claw back more than $700 million from a payments firm suspected to have faked its financial statement for at least 20 years and abruptly collapsed into bankruptcy this week.

alerts.title: Workspace urges investors to block ‘destructive’ Saba proposals
alerts.summary: Flexible office provider Workspace has called on investors to block “destructive” attempts by notorious activist investor Saba to force a sell-off of its properties.  The FTSE 250 firm issued a plea to shareholders on Thursday urging them to vote against each of the proposals submitted by the New York-based hedge fund to its annual general [...]
